verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. LORD, You showed favor to Your land; You restored the fortunes of Jacob.
verses.2: You forgave the guilt of Your people; You covered all their sin. Selah
verses.3: You withdrew all Your fury; You turned away from Your burning anger.
verses.4: Restore us, God of our salvation, And cause Your indignation toward us to cease.
verses.5: Will You be angry with us forever? Will You prolong Your anger to all generations?
verses.6: Will You not revive us again, So that Your people may rejoice in You?
verses.7: Show us Your mercy, LORD, And grant us Your salvation.
verses.8: I will hear what God the LORD will say; For He will speak peace to His people, to His godly ones; And may they not turn back to foolishness.
verses.9: Certainly His salvation is near to those who fear Him, That glory may dwell in our land.
verses.10: Graciousness and truth have met together; Righteousness and peace have kissed each other.
verses.11: Truth sprouts from the earth, And righteousness looks down from heaven.
verses.12: Indeed, the LORD will give what is good, And our land will yield its produce.
verses.13: Righteousness will go before Him And will make His footsteps into a way.
